series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents, memoranda, reports and correspondence that do not pertain to a specific agency or a major project, including weekly reports, OBM and OAKS Directives, legislation tracking, and NASBO files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current biennium and one previous biennium, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain current biennium and one previous biennium, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
